endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/denyAssignments
endpoints.description: Gets all deny assignments for the subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/denyAssignments
endpoints.description: Gets deny assignments for a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{parentResourcePath}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/denyAssignments
endpoints.description: Gets deny assignments for a resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENTRESOURCEPATH}} with a real parentresourcepath. Replace {{RESOURCETYPE}} with a real resourcetype. Replace {{RESOURCEPROVIDERNAMESPACE}} with a real resourceprovidernamespace. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /{denyAssignmentId}
endpoints.description: Gets a deny assignment by ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DENYASSIGNMENTID}} with a real denyassignmentid.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/denyAssignments
endpoints.description: Gets deny assignments for a scope.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/denyAssignments/{denyAssignmentId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DENYASSIGNMENTID}} with a real denyassignmentid. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.
